title: [codereview-pass2-security] Missing security note in CCP16 Kconfig help
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/Kconfig:118-125 - The help text for LICHEN_LINK_CCP16_LOAD_BALANCING does not mention the security rationale for selecting LICHEN_SCHC (prevents disabling compression on density/load metrics in RPL control traffic which could enable amplification attacks or buffer issues). CoAP Kconfig has explicit SECURITY: notes. Add similar comment per spec/06-security.md. P3 readability/maintainability. No P0-P1 bypass found - select is correct and effective.
close_reason: Added SECURITY note to CCP16 help text explaining SCHC select rationale for density metrics control messages per other insecure-option patterns and spec. All codereview findings resolved.
